description: Specialized gates for unattended scheduled or webhook-triggered agent routines.

gates.message: Unattended routines must create feature branches and PRs. Direct writes to protected branches are blocked.
Routine merge requested. Confirm test output, review state, branch SHA, and decision-journal evidence first.
Harness or prompt behavior change detected. Require per-model evals, ablation notes, and soak/rollout evidence.
Connector write detected. Workspace routines must ask before cross-app writes unless an explicit approval policy allows it.
